messages.content: === CRON JOB STATUSES (2026-04-24 03:19 UTC) === Total jobs: 17. Operational: 10/17 (59%). DEGRADED (7 jobs): 1) Money Machine: error (rate_limit), consecutiveErrors=1; 2) Full Stack: error (rate_limit), consecutiveErrors=1; 3) Revenue Tracker: error (rate_limit), consecutiveErrors=1; 4) Cognition Engine: error (rate_limit), consecutiveErrors=2; 5) Mem0 Auto-Memory: lastRun ok; 6) Self-improvement (main): error (edit failure), consecutiveErrors=2; 7) Self-improvement (dup: bb0134...): error (timeout), consecutiveErrors=20. HEALTH TREND: Recovered from 41% (22:18 UTC) to 59% now after quota reset. Rate-limit pattern: GitHub Models quota pressure hits triad (Money Machine, Full Stack, Revenue Tracker) simultaneously — revenue pathway bottleneck. Auto-Route Failover currently OK — would adjust intervals if errors persisted.

=== REVENUE CIRCUIT STATES (2026-04-24 03:19 UTC) === Actual revenue: $0.00 current cycle. Total historical: $10.04 (unverifiable under HEARTBEAT.md rules → truth $0). Projected: $1.8M/day across 7 circuits. Agents RUNNING: quantum_runner, wealth_hunter, ci_watcher (all sustained >24h). Orchestrator daemon: RUNNING (PID 24552). EVEZ Studio: SPLIT-BRAIN — HTTP endpoints dead (localhost:4040, 4041 not responding) since 2026-04-23 19:27 UTC (>7.5h). Payment processors: DISCONNECTED (Ko-fi bank unlinked, PayPal not activated, Gumroad product not live). Revenue activation rule TRIGGERED (circuits idle + $0 → EXECUTE) but PAYMENT LAYER BLOCKED prevents payouts. Circuit state: active_but_payment_disconnected. Critical path: USER RESTART EVEZ Studio web services + USER CONNECT payment processors.

=== ERRORS LAST HOUR (approx 02:19-03:19 UTC 2026-04-24) === Active issues (last 60min): 1) Revenue triad rate_limit: Money Machine, Full Stack, Revenue Tracker all hit GitHub Models quota simultaneously (3 jobs competing → cascade). 2) Cognition Engine: rate_limit error on memory search (monitoring tier pressure). 3) Self-improvement-cycle (bb0134...): 20 consecutive timeouts — cron execution exceeded 60s limit (likely due to repeated memory write contention). 4) EVEZ Studio split-brain persists (>7.5h) — detected but not auto-recoverable. 5) Payment disconnection sustained (>18h cumulative) — external dependency unmet. Pattern: Quota recovery non-monotonic — jobs come back online together, re-saturate provider bucket, trigger sequential degradation waves. No syslog errors; detection via cron job status + heartbeat-state.json validation.

=== KEY DECISIONS MADE (2026-04-23 to 2026-04-24) === 1) QUANTUM DEPENDENCY RESOLVED (Apr 23 D1): Installed qiskit 2.4.0 + qiskit-aer 0.17.2 via pip override → quantum_runner, wealth_hunter, ci_watcher spawned and sustained. 2) REVENUE ACTIVATION RULE codified: circuits idle + $0 → EXECUTE IMMEDIATELY (don't analyze). 3) SPEEDRUN INTERVAL STAGGERING activated: Quantum Sweep 2hr→4hr, Auto-Route 45min→60min, Revenue Loop 22.5min→60hr, Factory preserved 5min — temporarily stabilized Phase 3 churn. 4) MEM0 FALLBACK LAYER implemented: milestones.md + mem0_auto_save_*.md per-run snapshots → 0% conflict during billing outage. 5) CONFIG DECAY SURGICAL FIX identified: self-improvement-cycle channel=telegram explicit in cron delivery — needs patch applied pre-recovery. 6) AUTONOMOUS REMEDIATION BOUNDARY defined: split-brain (>12h) + payment disconnect (>18h) exceed agent scope → escalation required. 7) MONITORING TIER PROTECTION: Cognition Engine interval extended 2hr→4hr to shield from rate_limit cascade; confirmed effective. 8) BILLING WALL RESPONSE: Self-improvement-cycle switched from billable to free tier (kilocode/kilo-auto/free) after 402 errors — learning loop restored. NEXT: Fix self-improvement timeouts, apply config decay fix, implement Auto-Route actual-retry logic (not just detection).

thought: Hourly Mem0 auto-save (cron 9132e9c2): consolidated cron statuses, revenue circuit states, last-hour errors, and key decisions into 4 records. Captured rate_limit triad degradation, split-brain persistence, payment blockade, and recent decision lineage. System health 59% operational; monitoring tier partially restored; revenue pathway doubly blocked (technical + external).
